property.name: include
property.value: Map:Common Data

property.name: name
property.value: Castle Town (Chapter 2 transformed)

property.name: image
property.value: Castle Town map Chapter 2 transformed.png

property.name: description
property.value: Sells [[item]]s to the [[party]]. Also accepts [[Jevil]]'s [[Shadow Crystal]] if they received it.

property.name: description
property.value: The [[party]] can train their battle skills here through various challenges.

property.name: page
property.value: Party Dojo

property.name: description
property.value: A restaurant where the [[party]] can fuse their [[item]]s.

property.name: page
property.value: Top Bakery

property.name: description
property.value: Allows the party to place their current [[recruit]]s at each table.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Ralsei]]'s home. [[Kris]], [[Susie]], and [[Lancer]] have individual rooms, while [[King]] is imprisoned in the basement.

property.name: page
property.value: Ralsei's castle

property.name: description
property.value: Contains topics regarding [[recruit]]s, [[item]] storage, and the game's [[Config#Controls|controls]].

properties.property: Mama Miba! Welcome to TOP Bakery! Our special chefs spin baked goods at the TOP of their class!

property.name: description
property.value: ''2F : LIVING QUARTERS''

property.name: description
property.value: BF : LIVING QUARTERS FOR BAD GUYS

properties.property: The castle town has transformed from the power of friendship. You are filled with the power of friendship-based architecture.

property.name: description
property.value: Susie examines her room and is overjoyed after seeing it.

property.name: description
property.value: As they leave, [[Ralsei]] "banishes" [[Kris]] and [[Susie]] from Castle Town after learning that they have homework to do.

property.name: description
property.value: When [[Kris]] returns from the Light World, the objects they brought with them enlarge and transform Castle Town. [[Susie]] reunites with [[Lancer]], and she and Kris are directed by [[Ralsei]] to [[Ralsei's castle|his castle]].

property.name: description
property.value: Doubles down on their cowardly nature and moves to the top of the cliff. He is not seen for the rest of the game.

property.name: page
property.value: Mr. Society

property.name: description
property.value: Comments on [[Mr. Society]]'s departure.

property.name: page
property.value: Mr. Elegance

property.name: description
property.value: Resorts to eating clothes due to the absence of available trees.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Kris]] is given the option to take a bite of the clothes. [[Susie]] comments on their choice.

property.name: description
property.value: Expresses enjoyment of their current shape and asks [[Kris]] not to tell anyone.

property.name: description
property.value: Compliments his new home, but laments the lack of evil rulers and his status as [[Lancer]]'s "vice father".

property.name: page
property.value: Rouxls Kaard

property.name: description
property.value: Expresses her satisfaction of her new home and hopes the party will like it as well. She also reminds [[Kris]] about their [[Bed Inspector]] title if they received it in [[Chapter 1]].

property.name: description
property.value: Welcomes the party to [PLAYER]Town.

property.name: description
property.value: States they they are "bjust a block".

property.name: description
property.value: Waits outside the castle out of a desire to lose the race he proposed earlier

property.name: description
property.value: Comments on the [[Rudinn Ranger]]'s higher level.

property.name: description
property.value: Declares the day "National Ham Sandwich Day of Independence".

property.name: page
property.value: Rudinn Ranger

property.name: description
property.value: Comments on their "clean start" in their new home.

property.name: description
property.value: Offers advice on battles, including grazing and hitbox size.

property.name: page
property.value: Battle's Master

property.name: description
property.value: Comments on how her house transformed into a dojo

property.name: description
property.value: Comments on their absence in [[Chapter 1]] and warns against meeting their friends.

property.name: description
property.value: Resolves to train themselves for the dojo tournament.

property.name: description
property.value: Laments how he is forced to work at the [[Cafe]] due to the [[Top Bakery]] already being occupied. Allows the [[party]] to check their [[recruit]]s.

property.name: page
property.value: Top Chef

property.name: description
property.value: Comments on how scary it is moving to a new place.

property.name: page
property.value: Little ball

property.name: description
property.value: Offers to keep [[Ralsei]]'s hat racked until he needs it.

property.name: page
property.value: Royal Coat Rack

property.name: description
property.value: Is "violently" protecting the jail.

property.name: page
property.value: C. Round

property.name: description
property.value: Introduces themselves as Goulden Sam.

property.name: page
property.value: Goulden Sam

property.name: description
property.value: Still behind bars and dressed as animals, but they have grown to enjoy their new home.

property.name: page
property.value: Former Kings

property.name: description
property.value: States that the prison is nice

property.name: page
property.value: Goulden Sam

property.name: description
property.value: The animals state that, as cultural exchange, they have decided to dress as kings.

property.name: page
property.value: Cage Animals

property.name: description
property.value: Comments on his imprisonment. As the [[party]] leaves, he expresses concern for [[Lancer]] and dismisses his threat to throw him off a cliff as a bluff.

property.name: description
property.value: When [[Susie]] tells Lancer about her new room, Lancer suggessts digging a tunnel so he can access it, despite the room having a door.

property.name: description
property.value: Malius offers to [[fuse]] certain [[items]] together to make new ones.

property.name: description
property.value: Lancer offers a Lancer Cookie if the [[party]] does not already have one.

property.name: page
property.value: Lancer Cookie

property.name: description
property.value: Going into the light takes the [[party]] back to the School.
